free_text: -Measurement of (N,P), (N,A) and (N,2N) cross-sections
of heavy nuclei.- (In German)
200 keV cascade accelerator of Institute
fuer Radium Forschung und Kernphysik.
T(d,n)He4 reaction, integrate neutron flux
Oxides Pr6-O11, Nd2-O3, Gd2-O3, Tb4-O7, Dy2-O3, Er2-O3
(chemical purity >99.9), Ce-O2 (purity >99.0%).
H-I-O(3) and Cs(2)-CO(3) (chemical purity >99.5%),
Natural isotopic composition. Powder form.
Activation, irradiation with Sandwich-method
Chemical separation. For H-I-O3 (500 mg weight)
and Cs2-CO3 (588 mg weight) samples.
3 inch * 3 inch NaI(Tl) detector.
Gammas.
From Table 1,Acta Physica Austriaca,34(1971)209.
Corrected for self-absorption, geometry and counting-
loss in coincidence.
Uncertainties in photo-peak analysis (up
Uncertainty due to corrections for
geometry (up to 2.7 %).
Error in determination of counting-loss of
coincidence (up to 2.5 %).
Probable error in weight-correction at
chemical separation (1 or 2.5 %).
M.M. Dates were corrected for 4-digits year.
Free text was corrected to be "human-readable".
BIB and COMMON information was added.
SD: Half-life of Na-24 corrected following
presentation in the article (14.96 sec -> 14.96 hr)
ERR-ANALYS update.
